# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

impl cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_from_linear_interleaved(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], core::option::Option<&mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], core::option::Option<&mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_srgb_u8_with_diffmap(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8_with_diffmap(&mut self, &[u8], core::option::Option<&mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::compute_with_warm_ref_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], core::option::Option<&mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>>) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::is_strip_mode(&self) -> bool
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::new(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, cvvdp::params::CvvdpParams) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::new_with_geometry(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, cvvdp::params::CvvdpParams, cvvdp::params::DisplayGeometry) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::new_with_geometry_and_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, cvvdp::params::CvvdpParams, cvvdp::params::DisplayGeometry, cvvdp_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::new_with_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, cvvdp::params::CvvdpParams, cvvdp_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<()>
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque::warm_reference_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32]) -> cvvdp_gpu::Result<()>
impl core::marker::Freeze for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl core::marker::Send for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl !core::marker::Sync for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl core::marker::Unpin for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for cvvdp_gpu::CvvdpOpaque
pub const cvvdp_gpu::CVVDP_COLUMN_NAME: &str
pub const cvvdp_gpu::MAX_LEVELS: usize
pub const cvvdp_gpu::N_CHANNELS: usize
pub const cvvdp_gpu::PYCVVDP_REFERENCE_VERSION: &str
pub const cvvdp_gpu::PYRAMID_MIN_DIM: u32
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::estimate_gpu_memory_bytes_usize(u32, u32) -> usize
pub fn cvvdp_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type cvvdp_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, cvvdp_gpu::Error>
